final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    output reg [1:0] count
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 2'b00;
        end else begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end
endmodule
